project_type: Flutter mobile/web app (frontend) + Python FastAPI backend (backend)
build_system: Flutter/Dart for frontend, pip/requirements.txt for backend. No Dockerfile. No brazil.
test_framework: pytest with asyncio for backend (backend/tests/), Flutter widget/unit tests for frontend
build_command: Frontend: dart analyze (in frontend/). Backend: python -m py_compile for each .py file
test_command: Backend: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -x. Frontend: dart analyze frontend/lib/
verification_instructions: 1. Run python -m py_compile on all new/modified backend .py files. 2. Run dart analyze on frontend/lib/ directory. 3. Run pytest on backend tests.
setup_instructions: Backend: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt. Frontend: flutter pub get in frontend/
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Backend branch is feature/backend-setup-tests (local). Frontend branch is feature/project-setup-resolved (current). Must switch branches for backend work.
contribution_requirements: Never work on main. Frontend never calls Supabase directly. All routes have auth middleware. All inputs validated with Pydantic. Consistent error format. Rate limiting on all endpoints. Environment variables for secrets. No print statements, use logging. Strict null safety in Flutter. No dynamic types.
key_patterns: Backend: Routers in app/routers/ with APIRouter, middleware via Depends(get_current_user) and Depends(rate_limit()), Pydantic BaseModel for request/response. Frontend: Services extend ApiService (Dio-based), repositories use Riverpod providers, screens use ConsumerStatefulWidget, GoogleFonts.dmSans/dmSerifDisplay, AppColors for theming, GoRouter for navigation.
directory_structure: Root has frontend/ (Flutter app) and on backend branch has backend/ (FastAPI). Frontend: lib/core/ (constants, theme, utils), lib/data/ (models, services, repositories), lib/presentation/ (screens, widgets). Backend: app/ (config, main, routers/, services/, middleware/), tests/ (unit, integration, security, e2e).
